programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig is back as James Bond and his loyalty to MI6 leader M (Judi Dench) is tested as her past returns to haunt her. 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost. Javier Bardem and Ralph Fiennes also star.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: Sean Connery is back as James Bond, hired to prevent madmen from exploding a nuclear device near picturesque Nassau in this explosive thriller which earned an Oscar for its special visual effects.

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Just as Agent 007 finally discovers true love, he is thrown into spectacular action and danger in this entertaining adventure that stars George Lazenby as the charismatic Bond.

programme.title: Live and Let Die
programme.desc: Roger Moore's debut as James Bond takes him in pursuit of a voodoo- worshipping underworld drug czar who leads him from Harlem to New Orleans to the exotic Caribbean. Jane Seymour also stars.

programme.title: El mundo no basta
programme.desc: Cuando el carismático agente 007 (Pierce Brosnan) es asignado para proteger a la bella heredera de un imperio petrolero, se ve envuelto en una apasionante aventura llena de adrenalina que lo enfrenta a uno de sus peores enemigos.

programme.title: Otro día para morir
programme.desc: James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) quita el freno para llevarte por un viaje inolvidable a través del mundo y lleno de adrenalina, en esta aventura cargada de acción.

programme.title: GoldenEye: el regreso del agente 007
programme.desc: James Bond vuelve con una nueva y emocionante aventura, repleta de acciones impresionantes, escenarios lujosos, bellezas femeninas y vehículos potentes. Sin embargo, esta vez se enfrenta a un adversario particularmente peligroso.

programme.title: El mañana nunca muere
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan regresa como el valiente, astuto y devastadoramente encantador agente 007 en esta trepidante aventura.

programme.title: El mundo no basta
programme.desc: Cuando el carismático agente 007 (Pierce Brosnan) es asignado para proteger a la bella heredera de un imperio petrolero, se ve envuelto en una apasionante aventura llena de adrenalina que lo enfrenta a uno de sus peores enemigos.

programme.title: Otro día para morir
programme.desc: James Bond (Pierce Brosnan) quita el freno para llevarte por un viaje inolvidable a través del mundo y lleno de adrenalina, en esta aventura cargada de acción.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone, Wesley Snipes and Sandra Bullock star in this science fiction adventure about a dedicated cop who pursues a diabolical killer into the future.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two hot-shot rival Los Angeles detectives are forced to work together even though they are complete opposites. Finding themselves in prison together after being framed in a drug deal, the unlikely duo break out and go after a crime boss.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone, Arnold Schwarzenegger, and 50 Cent star as inmates who must break out of a top secret, high-security prison in this non-stop action-thriller.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: Investigator Jack Reacher leaps off the pages of Lee Child's novel and onto the big screen in this thriller. When a horrible crime is committed, all evidence points to the suspect in custody who offers up a single note in defense: "Get Jack Reacher!

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The outbreak of World War III has occurred, leaving a group of mid-Westernrn high school students turned refugees to slowly organize themselves into an effective guerilla force.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: Frick I Love Nature
programme.desc: Many animals can travel thousands of kilometers to arrive exactly where they need to be. But how? To find out, Gordie goes hang gliding, learns about magic pigeons and the star-nosed mole's spooky tentacle nose.

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Epic flights, sea journeys, and road trips all play a key part in many species' lives. Animals travel in search of food, shelter, or a mate. But booking and organizing travel is no easy feat when those plans involve hundreds or thousands of individuals.

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: The Bear follows the story of a young cub and an adult grizzly as they join forces to survive the perils inherent in their mountain habitat.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril has heard that although super-dangerous, the waters surrounding the remote archipelago of the Bissagos Islands in Guinea-Bissau are home to a fish known for putting up a brutal fight: the Cubera.

programme.title: Red Panda - The World's Cutest Animal
programme.desc: In the shadows of the jagged Himalayas a misty and mysterious kingdom hides a little-known world.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril is on a mission to catch a brutal and fearless predator capable of ramming sharks to death. Waist deep in shark waters, Cyril gets relentlessly beaten by violent waves while casting his line from Christmas Island.

programme.title: Giants of Fortune
programme.desc: Things seem bleak for fisherman Zosimo and his family until the world's biggest fish, the whale shark, comes along and changes everything.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote takes an extreme fall and lands right in a cholla cactus!

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: From their time as dangerous adversaries to colonialist hunters to the ever-present and considerable challenges of daily life… For lion, African elephant, leopard, buffalo and rhino, life isn’t easy when you’re big in the wild.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson finds a gliding tree frog, a toad that sprays poison and a poison dart frog.

programme.title: Chasing Walrus (With A Stubborn Photographer)
programme.desc: With the ice melted, and the walrus no-where to be seen, filmmakers Simon Stanford and Göran Ehlmé find themselves at the mercy of these arctic predators—fighting for survival in a habitat on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: China Wild
programme.desc: The Ocean…the world's largest ecosystem. Almost 3 million square kilometres of water surrounds China,

programme.title: New Life: Born to Hunt
programme.desc: Baby animals beguile with their innocent charm. But while some remain harmless, others have a deep-rooted instinct. It may take weeks or months of training to hone their skills, but in every corner of the globe predators emerge.

programme.title: Human Prey
programme.desc: What can happen when you meet a bear in the wild? Two Montana hikers are attacked by a mother grizzly intent on protecting her cubs; a young man loses his mother to a hungry, 400-pound black bear; and, two hunters in Alaska are ambushed by a grizzly.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear takes on a series of survival experiments in the Mojave Desert.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Now that most teams are reunited, they dive into the difficult task of surviving together and feeding two people. The final hiker faces a brutal mountain climb that could dash his hopes of making it to camp.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As Vancouver Island is pummeled by torrential rains, the remaining teams scramble to avoid freezing floodwaters. One team attempts a massive construction project that could be their key to survival.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The three remaining teams scramble for long-term advantage. One pair runs themselves ragged with an elaborate shelter build, while another faces hazards from the freezing Pacific waters on their own small craft.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: After nearly a month on Vancouver Island, the three remaining teams face existential threats at every turn. One participant is forced to fight a raging fire. Rising tensions threaten to end another partnership.

programme.title: I Survived . . .

programme.title: I Survived . . .

programme.title: I Survived . . .

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Military warn the expedition of terrorist threats. The crew explores a floating village. Troy looses his passports and medications. Tensions are high.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Lantern Recovery Op, Merrie faces a dangerous challenge when a twenty-ton drinks lorry gets grounded on a boggy verge. The truck is stuck fast and initial attempts to pull it free leave the lorry leaning over and threatening to topple on its side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, Sean is in a race against time to shift a tractor unit and trailer fully laden with 27 tonnes of wood, after it left a busy section of road and toppled over into a muddy ditch alongside a row of bushes.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire Recovery Operator Jay hopes he won't have sleepless nights over an Artic stacked full of bed frames and mattresses which has careered off a busy A road into a dry-stone wall and is lying in a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo, Carlos tries to make amends.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: It's a brand new start for the Operation Repo team when Lou bets big on a high-risk opportunity and sets up shop in Las Vegas! But first, Ronnie and Froy must wrangle a wrestling ring from a Lucha Libre school.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed when Froy brings unwanted trouble back to the office? Also, Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husband's better halves take the reins.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA.? Down two repo men, the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos, who interrupts a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati experiences two important Sonoran culinary traditions. First, on the coast in Bahía Kino, local fishermen receive 'the blessing' from a woman from the Seri tribe before heading out on the water to catch giant sea scallops.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati learns that carne asada goes way beyond grilled meat in Sonora. It’s an important weekly ritual that brings the whole family together. Back home, Pati throws a carne asada in her backyard for her husband and boys.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Sonoran wheat has shaped the cuisine of the entire Mexican north and is a staple of Sonoran cuisine. Pati tours one of Hermosillo’s oldest flour mills and gets a lesson on making coyotas, a traditional dessert, at a local bakery.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in the kitchen with her middle son, Sami, cooking recipes inspired by her travels in Sonora that she knows he’ll love – beef and potato chimichangas, rice with lentils and caramelized onions, and an avocado and radish salad.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming Tsai is cooking ravioli two ways. He starts off with a Buttery Shrimp Ravioli in a Watercress Nage, and then follows that up with a vegetarian version -- Edamame-Shiitake Ravioli served in a Thai Coconut Broth.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Chef Ming Tsai is going big on crab. He starts off with delicious Crab Cakes with a Lemon Aioli, and then follows that up with a vegetarian version -- gluten-free "Crab" Cakes with Lemon Aioli. Ming also makes a Pineapple Smash.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming Tsai prepares Maki Rolls with toasted nori, fresh fish, poached shrimp and avocado, a Sake Royale made with Junmai sake and cassis and a non-alcoholic Cassis-Lime Spritzer.

programme.title: Surviving Christmas

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In June 2003, Blake Stanfield and his aged dad Neil go kayaking in the Alaskan wilderness. Everything goes fine until they run into some ice on the river, and they soon find themselves swept underneath.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: Hit By A Train
programme.desc: A mountain biker has multiple injuries and her boyfriend has multiple fainting spells; a man's legs are severed when he's run over by a train; a drunken bachelor helps reveal the secret of a mystery nurse that has been working in the ER.

programme.desc: An alligator snapping turtle is clamped to a man's neck and won't let go; an ER physician races against an impending hurricane to clear the ER of patients before it hits; a tree trimmer is 20 feet above ground when he is impaled by his chainsaw.

programme.desc: Two skydivers, impaled by the same fence post, are rushed to the ER; multiple patrons from a dance club suddenly stop breathing and Dr. Jasper must determine the cause; a bride-to-be may miss her wedding after her finger gets stuck in a make-up jar.

programme.desc: When a drug deal goes wrong, Scott Freeburg takes off to Canada.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: A rock concert turns deadly as a pyrotechnics fire causes a stampede for the exits.

programme.desc: An addiction to crystal meth threatens the life of Travis, a former rock 'n' roll star. Can his girlfriend and family get him into treatment before it's too late?

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: The stories of two people who need the intervention of family and friends to save them from their addictions.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Family and friends stage interventions to halt the self-destructive behavior of Cristine and Kelly. Cristine is a wife and mother who drinks at least 18 beers a day.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Family and friends decide that an intervention is their only hope of saving two men: Kelly, a man with a 160 IQ who lives on the streets and survives on beer and other people's spare change, and Mark, who's so addicted to painkillers.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A decomposing body is found in a pond and a tent is found nearby. Dr. G performs the autopsy in the morgue but finds few clues other than fingerprints and mouthwash in the stomach.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Learn more about the Nazis and their heavily organized plunder of these riches that would ultimately become the most gigantic heist in history.

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: Learn about the code breaking and stealing that took place during the longest and most crucial water battle in WWII between Germany and the Allies.

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Hitler's Most Wanted

programme.title: Hitler's Most Wanted

programme.title: Hitler's Most Wanted
programme.desc: After the war, Nazi naval commander Karl Donitz claimed he'd only been a sailor following orders, but James is determined to prove he earned his bloody role as Hitler's successor.

programme.title: Hitler's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Known as the Butcher of Poland, Hans Frank warped the law to encourage persecution, enslavement, starvation, and genocide, and James wants to know more.

programme.title: World War II: The Last Heroes
programme.desc: Hitler orders a massive counter-attack in an attempt to cut the Allies in two. But British and Canadian forces press in on Germans forces from the North, while American troops close in from the South.

programme.title: World War II: The Last Heroes
programme.desc: Seizing the Scheldt Estuary fell to the Canadians who fought a victorious battle through mud, minefields, and canals to secure the critical shipping supply route to the Allied troops waiting in Antwerp.

programme.title: World War II: The Last Heroes
programme.desc: Under-armed and under-prepared US infantry divisions find themselves fighting off the best of the German army in the inaccessible hill and forest country of the Ardennes.

programme.title: World War II: The Last Heroes
programme.desc: With only the Rhine River between the Allies and Hitler. Once across the Rhine, the Allies meet the Russian troops at Elbe and the war reaches its endgame with the Russian siege of Berlin.

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.title: Secrets of War
programme.desc: The Desert Fox becomes outfoxed by the Ultra secret.

programme.desc: Desireé y Carlota se encuentran, se disponen a la entrega del dinero. En ese momento, Mauricio sale de la habitación y los tres cruzan sus miradas.

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Daniel le pregunta a Adrián si sabe algo sobre su hija, pero Adrián le miente y le dice que no sabe nada de ella.

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Daniel besa a Eva en la calle y un investigador la fotografía. Marisol se sorprende en la mansión, Francisco se ocupa de ella, pero se disfraza muy bien con su traje de chófer y la invita a tomar una copa.

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Victoria le muestra las fotos a Marcela de Eva y Daniel juntos. Marcela se niega a creerlo y Victoria muere de rabia.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Marcos recuerda cuando estaba en el sanatorio para enfermos mentales sin estar loco y también se hace pasar como Martin Vegas delante de Patricia y no dice la verdad.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Úrsula critica a Ramiro que se haya quedado en la ruina porque su padre es un ladrón que le robó. Úrsula le dice a Mariela que ya no permitirá a Ramiro comprometerse con ella.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Armando quiere conquistar a Patricia, pero ella no cree nada de las cosas que dice y no volverá a caer en sus falsas promesas de amor. Bruno quiere incendiar la hacienda de Úrsula.

programme.title: Corazón apasionado
programme.desc: Alejandro deja una tarea a su compadre Bruno, y consiste en quemar parte de la hacienda de su enemiga Úrsula Campos. Él cumple con su tarea, pero no tiene en cuenta los daños ocasionados.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Salvador le dice a Mauricio que para avanzar en las investigaciones sobre el atentado, tiene que interrogar a Rogelio. Mauricio despide a Salvador, Carlota comunica a su esposo que deben ir al aeropuerto.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: El médico le dice a Juana que el bebé está perfecto. Melancólica, Juana desea que Mauricio estuviera allí a su lado observando a su hijo.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen

programme.title: Juana la Virgen

programme.title: Unsealed Conspiracy Files

programme.title: Unsealed Conspiracy Files

programme.desc: The team travels to Fouke, AR, home of the 1972 bigfoot documentary, "The Legend of Boggy Creek." With a long history of sightings near this small town, the team takes to the surrounding swamps in hopes of proving Arkansas' bigfoot is more than a legend.

programme.desc: The team travels to Santa Cruz to visit the Bigfoot Discovery Museum. The museum's owner directs them to recent eyewitnesses and secret hotspots. Bobo hopes the smells from an authentic Hawaiian luau will be too much for nearby bigfoots to resist.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Best Evidence Yet

programme.desc: Trivette's brother Simon is in town with drug dealers, trying to arrange a big operation. The Rangers are determined to stop the organization. Simon is told he has to kill his brother.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Nagano, Japan where Racers take on an Olympic-sized Detour, and one team takes a tumble that may jeopardize their chances in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams face a race within the Race when they attempt to navigate the chaotic streets of Bangkok, and Racers eat a traditional delicacy - a "1,000 year old egg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers strap on lederhosen for a trip to Oktoberfest in Bavaria, Germany, and one team finds their race in jeopardy after losing their fanny pack.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, the Race travels to Monaco, where one team takes a big risk to gain an edge on the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When the race continues in Namibia, a flat tire deflates one team's hopes of leading the pack and the dreaded Double U-Turn returns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five teams race to Amsterdam and take a dip in a floating hot tub in search of their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When a judge with a history of questionable sentencing overturns a simple plea deal that Alicia arranged, she looks into his motivation. Also, Diane is made the offer of her career.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia learns more about her husband's fall from grace when she represents the wife of Peter's nemesis, Glenn Childs, in their divorce case.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When a star high school quarterback dies from an overdose of painkillers, Alicia represents the doctor who prescribed the medication. At home, Alicia and the kids deal with some bad news and she gives Peter information that makes his blood boil.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Tensions are high as Peter's appeal trial begins and Alicia defends a wealthy client in civil court whose innocence she doubts, even after he's found not guilty in criminal court of murdering his wife.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: As Peter strategizes on how to handle his retrial and the next steps in his public rehabilitation, Alicia and Will defend an attorney arrested for murder.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: At the Serra Canastra National Park, near the town of Sao Roque de Minas, Jack sets off in search of Brazil's Giant Anteater. Jack also visits the humble beginnings of Rio Zoo Francisco, the country's longest river.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Camped Out
programme.desc: Usually, Jack has to go out looking for wild animals. In this episode see what happens when he spends the night in their world! Hippos, bears, lions and elephants are just a few of the animals Jack encounters in his campy countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he crisscrosses the globe in search of animals who live in truly distinct habitats on the equator. Mountain gorillas, forest elephants, jaguars, orangutans, creatures from the Galapagos Islands, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to Australia's Gold Coast. Meet a rare blue-eyed koala, feed a Tasmanian devil and watch a tiger jump over Jack! Things get messy when Jack meets up with some boys from the outback and tries his hand at an Aussie tradition.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: In the wild, animals use their noses to find food, water and even mates! Today, Jungle Jack counts down the animal kingdom’s superior sniffers - from grizzly bears and sharks, to dogs and rhinos – find out which notable nose is the most powerful!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi explore South Africa's Thula Thula reserve, known for its heartwarming work saving African elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and Sue as they head to the southern tip of Chile to explore the untamed region of Patagonia! The land beneath the towering Andes Mountains is home to Condors, Guanacos, and some of the most beautiful Glaciers in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: My Better Half
programme.desc: Jack’s wife Suzi – she’s a loving mother, a passionate conservationist, and a fearless adventurer. Come along for encounters with dolphins, elephants, cheetahs and poison dart frogs, just to name a few.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the largest African elephant Jack has ever seen, to the littlest elephants on the planet…come along for the journey of a lifetime with the biggest land mammals on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Miniature Marvels
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some mini marvels of the animal world like, the mighty miniature donkeys, petite pygmy elephants, pint-sized Little penguins, high-flying hummingbirds, and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Whether they cross huge distances in a single leap like kangaroos, or gracefully soar above the waves like dolphins, or escape from predators like frogs, all of today’s countdown creatures are built to bounce, bound and jump around.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hoof It
programme.desc: Giraffes, zebras, moose and bongo have very different coats, but they all wear the same shoe style. We’re talking about hoofs, of course! Join Jungle Jack as he counts down today’s featured creatures, all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On a horseback safari in Botswana's Okavango Delta, Jack and his daughter Kathleen are charged by a bull elephant. Later, while riding past a scenic water hole, Jack and Kathleen observe a variety of animals, including a playful hippo.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Cats
programme.desc: From breathtaking tigers to elusive ocelots, lightning-fast cheetahs, leaping leopards, and the rarest lions on Earth. Join Jack Hanna for this Wild Countdown featuring 10 unforgettable encounters with nature’s top cats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Devils, Crocs & More
programme.desc: Something eerie is in the air on this Wild Countdown…millions of bats, dancing cobras, real devils and more! Come along as Jungle Jack counts down some of the creepiest creatures he’s met in dark corners around the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack discovers Costa Rica's Tortuguero National Park. He has a once-in-a-lifetime encounter with a wild Jaguar and meets Toucans, Monkeys, and Caimans all before checking out life in the remote village.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads straight for the world-class Sepilok Orangutan Rehabilitation Centre that specializes in rehabilitating orphaned baby orangutans and releasing them back to their forest home.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he samples some cultural delicacies on his way to discovering amazing creatures, like Spider Monkeys, Sloths, Rhinoceros Beetles, Proboscis Monkeys, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: It's all Relative
programme.desc: Prepare to be shocked and amazed, because today Jack is exploring the family trees of six wild animals! Believe it or not rlephants are related to manatees, the same is true for rhinos and tapirs, giraffe and okapi and more surprising animal relatives.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen travel to northern Canada for encounters with Beluga whales and Polar bears. At Churchill, the Hannas find Hudson Bay much to their liking, but nothing tops the small town's hottest summer pastime.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he gets a rare behind-the-scenes look at the daily life of the Maasai in a village in Tanzania. Then Jack encounters Hippos, Jackals, Hartebeest, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a trip with Jack and the Hanna family to Bruny Island in Tasmania. See an all-white wallaby, watch wild fur seals at play and go on a thrilling boat ride on the Tasman Sea that ends with a surprise dolphin encounter.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: River Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready to set sail with Jungle Jack for rolling river adventures from Africa to the Amazon! Rivers provide more than drinking water for wildlife- a river can also be a habitat, a hiding place, and even a runway.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to Canada to check out four World Heritage sites in beautiful Alberta.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack trades his safari suit for a wet suit as he dives in with bottle-nosed dolphins! Jack and Sue, get more than they bargained for as they go along for the ride with dolphins on their daily outing into the open ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack boards a submarine heading deep into the waters of Curacao, uncovering everything from lionfish to newly discovered species. Then Jack and the team from the Columbus Zoo work to rehabilitate coral reefs by planting baby coral in the ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to Zimbabwe! Just around the corner from majestic Victoria Falls, the folks at Elephant Camp are working to provide a home to orphaned Elephants in need. Jack assists the team in radio collaring a soon-to-be-released female.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: Jamie creates an alternative to the traditional Christmas dinner with a mixed roast, veggie crown and toffee panettone dessert.

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a stress-free guide to festive feasting with luxurious smoked salmon pâté, pork stuffing with silky leeks, sweet peaches and roasted chestnuts, and goose-fat roast potatoes that are fluffy on the inside and crisp on the outside.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals

programme.desc: After preparing breakfast cosisting of yogurt, chilli scrambled egg wrap, and bloody mary, Jamie and his mates gather around the TV to watch England play in World Cup 2002.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Pukka Tukka party food.

programme.desc: Jamie treats his office staff to a Christmas dinner.

programme.title: Save With Jamie

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up a super-fast, extra delicious crispy breaded chicken for the family; he and Buddy share their secrets to a cheat's dessert; then Jamie shows us how to transform a burger by using sweet potato in two new ways.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up a big, bold sausage casserole, packed full of flavor -it's a new family favorite in the Oliver house, then he shows us the most beautifully brilliant way to dress an aubergine salad, served with the quickest homemade flat breads.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie gives traditional roast chicken a French twist; shows new ways to use up stale bread; and cooks up his take on a creamy prawn linguine for his friend and mentor Gennaro Contaldo.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.title: Jamie's Ultimate Veg

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy is torn between his biological father, who he hasn't seen since he was a baby, and the stepfather who raised him. Meanwhile, Elaine tries to tell her parents that her fiance is a paraplegic.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A woman's (Greer Garson) ability to see the future may hinder her relationship with an attractive man. Plus, a single mother thinks she meets a divorced man traveling with his daughter, but that's not exactly the case.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Angelorum Dominicus suddenly appears aboard the Pacific Princess without a reservation and soon begins to spread love and happiness to everyone on the cruise, especially a little boy in need of an operation.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A female producer is adamant about not wanting to start a relationship with an actor, but the thespian has other plans. Meanwhile, a therapist goes on a cruise with his group, while Doc and his nephew compete for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Gopher suspects a skipper under Capt. Stubing's tutelage is trying to take his job, the crew jumps into action to protect their boss. Meanwhile, a lovely lady causes havoc when she boards with two men who are each after her hand.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A woman's (Joan Rivers) shyness around men is exacerbated by her recent mastectomy that is until she meets an understanding man. Meanwhile, when a married couple contemplates divorce, it's their son, who's also a lawyer, that gets caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When an elderly man's granddaughter falls for one of his fresh-faced friends, the man seeks out some of the youth potion for himself. Meanwhile, things start moving a little too fast for Isaac and the woman he's dating.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A sarcastic woman (Anne Meara) goes on a rampage when she finds out she's on a cruise with the same man she's suing (Jerry Stiller) for damages. Meanwhile, a famous professor meets a former student who is hired to replace his mentor/

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Stubing meets a gorgeous movie queen (Joan Collins), who recently shed her ninth husband, he is fascinated by her charm and beauty. Then, a man decides to prioritize golf over his wife, so the neglected woman decides to play ball with an old friend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The captain's daughter is put in a tough situation she is accused of stealing supplements from Doc's office. Then, Gopher's uncle (Red Button) falls in love with the lady who runs the ship's gift shop.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When someone goes missing in Alexandria, the community goes on alert, and search parties venture out.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: To save one of their own, Rick's group must venture outside the walls; their experience changes their lives forever.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: For a number of familiar faces, a new, well-established community seems too good to be true.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new group of survivors seem to have it all in their impressive community; however, there is a price.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The remaining members of the group try to keep it together in Alexandria; they receive a sobering visit.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Someone stumbles upon a brand new society unlike anything seen before.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A deeper look at the Sanctuary and the world of the Saviors; members of Alexandria look for supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan's unwelcome visit to Alexandria continues as other members scavenge for supplies; things quickly spin out of control.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others are led to a new community, where they meet the residents and their ruler; a familiar face resurfaces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While searching for a missing Alexandrian, Rick and his group encounter a mysterious collective, its inhabitants unlike any they have come across.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An Alexandrian discovers they must navigate the mysterious, confusing and terrifying world within the Saviors' compound.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group scavenges for supplies; back in Alexandria, someone must make a morally challenging decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aunque algunos sobrevivientes crean que deben ser brutales para mantenerse con vida, vemos que la fe a veces puede ser la herramienta de supervivencia más poderosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras múltiples caminos se entrechocan, Rick se enfrenta cara a cara con la brutalidad más absoluta. ¿Él y su grupo tendrán lo que hace falta para sobrevivir?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En el comienzo de la quinta temporada, conoceremos las verdaderas intenciones de la gente de Terminus; mientras, Rick y el grupo se encuentran rodeados, superados en armas y en número.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Con pocas provisiones, y sin poder confiar en la gente a su alrededor, Rick lidera una misión donde el riesgo podría ser mucho mayor que la recompensa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Enfrentados a un grupo de personas despreciables, Rick y sus compañeros deberán idear un plan para obtener una ventaja decisiva.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En este episodio conoceremos a otro grupo de sobrevivientes. Pero lo que parece seguro y agradable por fuera tiene también un lado oscuro.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Nuevos problemas generan nuevas disputas en el grupo durante una misión. ¿Conseguirán superar las diferencias y sobrevivir a este desafío?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En una heroica misión de rescate, algunos miembros del grupo deben volver a un lugar familiar. El escenario será tan grande como el riesgo de la misión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las reglas y la moral son dejadas de lado a causa de nuevos enemigos. Rick intentará conseguir un acuerdo pacífico, pero ellos podrían preferir la violencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de todas las dificultades que el grupo enfrentó, un pequeño desvío podría ser la solución que buscaban.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La vida a la intemperie dejó al grupo golpeado y atormentado. ¿Serán capaces de continuar esa marcha penosa? ¿Son siquiera las mismas personas que alguna vez fueron?

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Adaptarse a un nuevo estilo de vida resulta difícil para el grupo. Quizás la vida en la carretera haya sido demasiado traicionera para que vuelvan a ser lo que alguna vez fueron.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Shingles are installed on a small roof valley. Exterior windows are trimmed with a prefabricated trim system. The homeowners make design selections. The railing on the original staircase is raised.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Curb appeal is added to the front yard. A custom desk is built using off-the-shelf material. An electric vehicle charger is installed, and the secret to achieving a high gloss paint finish is shared.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Renovation on the 1902 house is done and the homeowners are ready to move in, but first, the crew and homeowners participate in the town's annual bed race. After, they meet at the house for a tour.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew takes on a first period home in the town of Ipswich, MA. A brief history on heating first period homes is given. The homeowners get a lesson on how to properly salvage the old floors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The architect explains the architectural features of a first period gambrel and shares his plans for improvement. Demo starts in the ell. The town historian gives a tour of a 1717 first period home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The house is supported while the foundation is demoed. A plan is devised to raise the timber frame in the ell. An old cistern is examined. Drainage issues are addressed. A book from 1826 is found.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The timber frame structure of the ell is disassembled to be rebuilt later. A clapboard manufacturer in Maine is visited. Fireplace designs are discussed. The homeowner considers a new house color.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A fireplace is demoed; but the chimney is saved. Restoration of the timber frame begins. A sewer ejector is installed. The steel ridge beam for the new ell is prepped. Kevin goes clamming.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old ell has been reassembled, and the new fireplace is constructed. A steel beam is craned into place to carry the weight of the roof in the new ell. The homeowner shops for a kitchen countertop.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The roof is insulated from the outside. Framing presents a challenge for running pipes. A lighting solution for the new ell is devised, and a lesson is given on how to properly waterproof a roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: HVAC ducts are hidden in the gambrel. A cinderblock enclosure is covered to mimic the old stone foundation. Damage to an original gunstock post is repaired. New clapboards are weaved into the old.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The project is halfway through construction. A water harvesting system is installed in the yard. The old barn is replaced with a new boathouse built in a factory and assembled onsite in one day.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A granite water table is installed on the 1720 house. Original roof boards are installed on the ell ceiling. A fieldstone wall is built, and a young carpenter talks about his return to the trades.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Wide floorboards are installed to match the existing wood in the house. A sink is fabricated out of soapstone, and a backsplash is fabricated from an old board. Lighting installation wraps up.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A little over a year ago, renovation began on the 1720 first period home. Restoration is now complete. Tremendous care went into preserving the home's history while making modern improvements.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor and master carpenter Norm Abram arrive at the latest project house in Newton, Massachusetts, An 1897 Colonial Revival in late Victorian Shingle transitional-style.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Host Kevin O'Connor sees the plans for a large new patio, the kitchen, plumbing and heating and the 100-year old chimney. Roger Cook cuts down the giant yews obscuring the front of the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Prepping the footings for new porch columns. A perc test for the new landscape plan. Shingle style review and plan. Removing a rotted red maple from the side yard with a tree crew and crane.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The temporary support beam and old kitchen walls are removed. Old wiring created code violations. Floor plans and design choices are revealed. The closet ties in with the new master bath.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Installing pre-cast concrete to create a retaining wall. Evaluating historic wallpaper. Putting a new window in an old wall. 19th century buildings are moved as part of a construction project.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: What colors might be appropriate for a Shingle-style house. Building the 12-foot wall of a new kitchen bump out. Stained glass restoration. A concrete truck pours a small buttress wall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Progress on the porch, kitchen, and master bath. An update on the mechanical systems. How granite is quarried and split. Installing the new Milford Pink granite and also matching the old mortar.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Transplanting a large shrub to help with screening. Work on the fieldstone sitting wall. Installing a replacement window. Adding radiant heat panels. And crafting a beautiful 3-inch teak island top.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Building a fieldstone and mortar sitting wall. Troublesome conditions with the wood-to-ground contact. Termite pest control. New home designs - clean and open on the inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Prepping the exterior for paint. Bluestone patio and massive bluestone stairs. Wrapping exterior columns with shingles. Spray foam insulation is put in. Lighting restoration to meet modern needs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Saving the old plaster in the billiards room Selections for the home's lighting, paint colors, and furnishings. Norm shows rare and valuable antique pool tables and sees work on the pool table.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The kitchen is plastered, the new white oak flooring is down, and the cabinets have just arrived. A new generation of kitchen garbage disposers. Waterproofing the shower by using a paint-on membrane.

programme.title: Ultraman Ace

programme.title: Ultraman Ace
programme.desc: Seiji and Yuko notice the Ultra Sign shown in the sky. Ace joins up with his four brothers, and they head to Planet Golgotha. Unfortunately, this is all a trap devised by the Yapool. Terrible-Monster Barabbas arrives on the undefended Earth!

programme.title: Ultraman Ace

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Yuri Foreman
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2010, Miguel Cotto defeated Yuri Foreman at Yankee Stadium, claiming the WBA Super Welterweight title. Foreman's knee injury hindered his performance and Cotto won by TKO in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2007, Miguel Cotto fought Zab Judah in a welterweight championship bout at Madison Square Garden in New York. Cotto emerged victorious with a TKO in the 11th round, solidifying his reputation as a formidable welterweight champion.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Vince Phillips vs Kostya Tszyu
programme.desc: On May 31st, 1997, Vince Phillips fought Kostya Tszyu for the IBF Junior Welterweight Title in Atlantic City. In an incredible back-and-forth battle, Phillips pulled off a shocking and emotional upset over Tszyu with an impressive 10th round TKO win.

programme.title: Humberto Soto vs Urbano Antillon
programme.desc: On December 4th, 2010, Humberto Soto fought Urbano Antillon for the WBC World Lightweight Title at the Honda Center in Anaheim. In a very close fight that could have gone either way, Soto came out on top victorious via an unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Vinny Pazienza vs Roberto Duran 1
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1994 Vinny Pazienza faced Roberto Duran for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout Pazienza went down in round 5 and Duran won this fight by unanimous decsion.

programme.desc: In this dramatic season finale, the ladies rehearse a number for Andrea's upcoming dance benefit, during which one of them has a serious and painful accident. With less than an hour before showtime, an ambulance is called...

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Drita considers a major life change when she receives some bad news, Renee is glad to be rid of Junior, and Karen's anger about her friend's betrayal explodes into chaos at a rooftop bar.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: The four ladies gather for the first time since the rooftop brawl to talk with Wendy Williams about backlash to the show, their love lives, regrets from Season 1 and hints for Season 2.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Renee is amped to finally get on the table for her full body makeover, but her 'easy-fix' suddenly turns into her plastic surgery nightmare. Meanwhile, Drita and Carla are ready to dive into summer fun as newly single ladies.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: At Renee's party, Drita's make-up talk with Karen takes a vicious turn. Later, Junior finds out his sentencing from last year's mob bust and we learn of new mob wife's Ramona's infamous Mafia lineage.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: In the aftermath of her party, Renee takes up her issues with the ladies' violent behavior and sets out to confront Carla. Drita takes some serious steps to deal with life after Lee.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: With Ramona in the mix, frenemy lines are fiercely drawn between the two camps of women. When Karen and Carla have a sit down, tempers flare as Karen declares war and Carla the 'Ice Princess' turns up the heat.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: As tensions flare between Ramona and Carla, Drita takes further steps to finalize her divorce.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Renee's insecurities about Junior's past cheating ways start to resurface, and with Drita's help, Renee's curiosity leads to breaking into Junior's phone.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: After an intense couples counseling session, Renee faces the harsh realities that the fairytale life with Junior she's always dreamed of may be nothing but a nightmare. Karen begins to promote her tell all book 'Mob Daughter'.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: In the season two premiere, Malaysia's desire to bring Jackie back into the group has the ladies baffled. Also, Laura and Gloria find that despite being sisters, they've grown apart. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie's surprise appearance at Gloria's cooking party leaves a bad taste in everyone's mouth. Also, Gloria lands a plum acting role and Draya's behavior at a photo shoot irks newcomer Brooke. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie's unique wedding plans and new tattoo raise eyebrows. Also, a phone call to Gloria tests Draya and Jackie's friendship. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie and Tormenta battle Laurie and Lindsey Carlson in the opening match. The WOW World Championship Title Match is here as The Beast must prove she can withstand the force of Penelope Pink who has been gearing up to reclaim her title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Americana and Santana Garrett take on Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx. Lil J-Boogie has an opportunity to prove herself against Coach Campanelli. Las Bandidas get their shot at the tag team championship title as they battle The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's a 6-person tag team match up when Lana Star sends her fabulous team of Penelope Pink and Miami's Sweet Heat to fight The Tonga Twins and Tiki Chamorro. The Beast must defend her championship title against Tormenta in the WOW Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Gigi Gianni and BK Rhythm take on Crystal Waters and Sandy Shore. It's Stephy Slays turn to battle one of Coach Campanelli's lackeys, Gloria Glitter. In the Main Event, Chainsaw and Siren The Voodoo Doll take on champions The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones is back in the ring for a title shot against The Beast. Teammates Pep Riley and Sasha Sparks vie for a top spot in WOW as they fight Las Bandidas. A rematch is set WOW's biggest Australian Superheroes Genesis and Princess Aussie.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Top Tier has been dominating in the ring, but now they face the joint forces of Lil J-Boogie, Stephy Slays, and Ariel Sky who want to make them pay for their underhanded ways. In the Main Event, Tormenta faces former WOW Champion Penelope Pink.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster and a surprise partner, announced by Samantha Smart, take on the Fierce Sisters. Chantilly Chella and Holidead face off with Las Bandidas. In the Main Event, Lana Star challenges the culprits who ran up her hotel bill.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Classmaster attempts to put Santana Garrett into detention as they battle in the ring. Also in action is Reina Del Rey, Sandy Shore, Holidead, Genesis and Katarina Jinx. The action heats up and still, so many questions surround WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW's new arena is the perfect setting for the unveiling of the first-ever World Trios Championship Titles. In the Main Event, Penelope Pink and Princess Aussie will wrestle to determine the one contender for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star is excited about two things...her team, Miami's Sweat Heat, defending their WOW World Tag Team Championships against The All American Girls, and the large amount of money The Mother Truckers owe her. And Lana's coming to collect on both!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: David McLane's major announcement - and major reward - sends the locker reeling as the WOW Matchmaker attempts to finally uncover the assailants who attacked The Beast, who finally returns to the ring for the first time since last season.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Top Tier puts their Trios Championships on the line against The Mighty Mights and Keta Rush. Adriana Gambino makes an announcement that affects the entire locker room. In the Main Event, Tormenta and Princess Aussie team up vs Miami's Sweet Heat.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The luxury hotel bill is due and Lana Star has come to collect as Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag report for duty at Lana's mansion. Adriana Gambino debuts her new faction, The Alliance, when BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni take on The All American Girls.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones must defeat Penelope Pink in the Main Event to secure a championship match vs The Beast. Over at Lana Star's Fab Four mansion, Big Rig Betty's tired of working for Lana Star, but is surprised to learn that Holly doesn't seem to mind it.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The government employs Randall to portray an escaped prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole and stashed away in a secret location.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall finds his prey in the hands of a lynch mob wiping out his bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City, who celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh must bring a man back for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings a wanted man into the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is looking for a man who, while trying to rob a bank, is bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man shoots his brother over ownership of their property and blames it on an Indian who reclaimed his horse the man found and stole.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is captured by a corrupt deputy and is forced by the sheriff to work on a chain gang in a gold mine.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is tracking an escape artist who is forced to distract a town, letting three guys rob the bank.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh plays detective when he signs on to help an amnesiac discover his identity.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After watching her father stabbed to death, a grieving daughter wants immediate justice rather than wait for the slower-moving wheels of justice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is determined to debunk the dire menace posed by a marauding monster that has smashed mining camps, decimated an Indian village, and has the Nugget City residents hiding behind locked doors.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh, down on his luck, hires out for $100/day to find a woman - one catch is she may be dead.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in \\"Doc\\" Phillips hoping he can lure Clell Fanning out as he has an old score to settle with Clell.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is arrested on a bogus horse-stealing charge.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To net a thousand-dollar reward and save a friend, Josh saves Tolliver Bender from hanging so he can testify in a nearby trial.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: An attractive woman hires Josh for $1000 to clear her father on a false murder charge in a town that is not very welcoming to Josh.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason are hired to chase a killer who went to Mexico by his brother who is about to hang for a crime his brother committed.
